caption: The video captures a professional interview taking place at MongoDB World 2022, held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. Two men, both dressed in suits, are seated at a round table equipped with a laptop and some papers, suggesting a formal discussion or presentation. The man on the right is actively speaking, using hand gestures to emphasize his points, while the man on the left listens attentively. In the background, other attendees can be seen mingling and engaging in conversations, indicating a lively and interactive event atmosphere. The setting is well-lit with modern decor, and the event appears to be sponsored by MongoDB, as indicated by the branding on the screen.
